{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323012050FD68A5D18A905D6B2549"}"},"total":7013},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7282649056887014201","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好好好，这本书真的写的好。我是真的喜欢这种类型的书，而且文笔还不错，主角天才流就是舒服，不想凡人流那样受委屈。最最最关键的是，我现在才发现作者的上本诸天的书我追更完而且还给了五星好评，难怪这本书这么有感觉，原来上本书我就被你小子给迷住了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1695625330,"group_id":"7239954742909078565","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwM2QCv4oSqHEIux7KgeaE/halevmlFDeL1IGthFmZTS","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/064195b0c86244d5a966c3118c84de0b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796422&x-signature=hrG5T3UQx8G1J0lqWdoM%2FgJRoOk%3D","user_id":"4134628348934264","user_name":"为我心海打榜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4134628348934264","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7239954742909078565","book_info":{"abstract":"综武世界，宋玄是一人一剑杀戮百万，随时可以令皇帝落水归天的剑道杀神；
仙侠大世界，宋玄是传法授道，压制七大气运皇朝之主不敢抬头的玄天道祖；
洪荒诸天宇宙，宋玄一剑破诸天，左手神话大罗，右手创世道果，圣人俯首，鸿钧遁走！
宋玄：逆风我就苟，顺风我就浪，打不过我就跑，打得过我就杀你全家！
这是一个从武侠世界开始，一步步杀穿诸天，成为鸿蒙道尊的故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7ae30ef278f9032ba02d0bd32c8827d4","author":"金紫辰","author_id":"","book_id":"7239954742909078565","book_name":"诸天：从迎娶邀月宫主开始","book_short_name":"大周玄衣卫","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#305878","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"13.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7239955855720841783","read_count":"136645","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3223485"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"1542","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,穿越,洪荒,诸天万界,奇幻仙侠,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9c104150aa3bd3e7c74d7fbbaf65619d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779384050&x-signature=HGGaI%2B0wSAwVz3Ni%2Fq3gs9%2FjqrM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3378151933617310","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","nov
